name: Chicken Curry#1
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Chicken breast, boneless and skinless
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean the chicken and remove all fat.
2. Heat the oil, then brown the cumin seeds and cardamom.
3. Add the Thai chile (watch for fumes) and cloves.
4. Add the chopped onion and cook until brown.
5. Add the tomatoes, ginger paste, garlic paste, and soy sauce. Cook together until all has a pasty texture.
6. Add the remaining spices and mix well.
7. Stir in the chicken and coat evenly with the paste.
8. Cook for five to seven minutes.
9. Add water and cover. Cook until tender, about 20 minutes.
10. Remove the chile before serving.
11. Garnish with fresh cilantro and serve with cooked rice.
